    C

    check() - Method in class com.client.network.HealthChecker
    Checks if the server is healthy.
    CleanHeapCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for clearing all elements from the collection.
    CleanHeapCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.CleanHeapCommand
     
    clear() - Method in class com.server.CommandHistory
    Clears the command history.
    clear() - Static method in class com.server.network.ServerRunner
    Clears the server instance.
    clear() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Removes all elements from the collection.
    Clear() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Clears all elements from the collection.
    ClientApp - Class in com.client
    Entry point for the client application.
    ClientApp() - Constructor for class com.client.ClientApp
     
    CliRunner - Class in com.cli
    CLI runner that manages the command-line interface loop.
    CliRunner() - Constructor for class com.cli.CliRunner
     
    CollectionFileManager - Class in com.utils
    Manages file operations for loading and saving the music band collection.
    CollectionFileManager() - Constructor for class com.utils.CollectionFileManager
     
    CollectionFileManager.LoadResult - Class in com.utils
    Result object for load operations containing success status, loaded bands, and warnings.
    CollectionFileManager.SaveResult - Class in com.utils
    Result object for save operations containing success status and details.

    com.cli - package com.cli

    Command - Interface in com.utils
    Interface for all command implementations in the application.
    COMMAND - Enum constant in enum class com.common.Request.RequestType
    Execute a command on the server (show, add, remove, etc.)
    CommandHistory - Class in com.server
    Tracks command history on the server side.
    CommandHistory() - Constructor for class com.server.CommandHistory
    Creates a new CommandHistory with an empty list.
    CommandManager - Class in com.utils
    Manager class responsible for parsing and routing user commands to the appropriate invoker methods.
    CommandManager() - Constructor for class com.utils.CommandManager
     
    CommandRegistry - Class in com.utils
    Registry of all available commands on the server.
    CommandRegistry() - Constructor for class com.utils.CommandRegistry
    Creates a new CommandRegistry and registers all available commands.
    CommandRegistry(CommandHistory) - Constructor for class com.utils.CommandRegistry
    Creates a new CommandRegistry and registers all available commands.
    compareTo(MusicBand) - Method in class com.model.MusicBand
    Compares this music band to another based on their ID values.
    connect() - Method in class com.client.network.AsyncClient
    Connects to the server.
    Coordinates - Class in com.model
    Represents a 2D coordinate system with x and y values.
    Coordinates(long, int) - Constructor for class com.model.Coordinates
    Constructs a new Coordinates object with the specified x and y values.
    countByNumberOfParticipants(int) - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Counts the number of elements in the collection with the specified number of participants.
    CountByParticipants(Integer) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Counts and displays the number of elements in the collection that have the specified number of participants.
    CountByParticipantsCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for counting elements by number of participants.
    CountByParticipantsCommand(Integer) - Constructor for class com.commands.CountByParticipantsCommand
    Constructs a CountByParticipantsCommand with the specified target count.
    createDefaultEnvFile() - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager
    Creates a default environment configuration file with default data paths.
